source_code.repo: custom mpi4py scripts (included in benchmark suite)

io_functions.write: f.write(data)  /* Python file I/O with DARSHAN_ENABLE_NONMPI */

fixes.cause: Uneven I/O load distribution across MPI ranks
fixes.fix: Balance I/O workload across ranks. Use collective I/O for automatic load balancing. Ensure each rank processes similar data volumes.
fixes.code_before: if (rank == 0) write(fd, all_data, total_size);  /* rank 0 does all I/O */
fixes.code_after:
/* Distribute I/O across all ranks */
MPI_File_write_all(fh, my_data, my_size, MPI_BYTE, &status);

io_functions.write: f.write(data)  /* Python file I/O with DARSHAN_ENABLE_NONMPI */

fixes.cause: Uneven I/O load distribution across MPI ranks
fixes.fix: Balance I/O workload across ranks. Use collective I/O for automatic load balancing. Ensure each rank processes similar data volumes.
fixes.code_before: if (rank == 0) write(fd, all_data, total_size);  /* rank 0 does all I/O */
fixes.code_after:
/* Distribute I/O across all ranks */
MPI_File_write_all(fh, my_data, my_size, MPI_BYTE, &status);
